error: The sandbox was not found: This error is likely due to sandbox timeout. You can modify the sandbox timeout by passing 'timeout' when starting the sandbox or calling '.set_timeout' on the sandbox with the desired timeout.

p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 P2P tests: (1) test_repo_benchmarks_node_syntax - checks node --check on scripts/benchmarks/bundle-size/*.mjs, (2) test_repo_scripts_node_syntax - checks node --check on scripts/*.mjs, (3) test_repo_all_scripts_node_syntax - checks node --check on all .mjs files in scripts/ recursively (covers scripts/benchmarks/common/ where new file is added), (4) test_repo_prettier_formatting - runs npx prettier --check on benchmark scripts. CI commands verified: node --check works on all .mjs files, npx prettier --check works. Skipped: full test/lint/build suites require pnpm/nx which are not available in base Docker image without network installs.

validate.notes: Fixed test_outputs.py: The parseArgs_function_works and env_fallback_works tests were failing because the test harness included the full script which has a main() call at the end. After the test code ran successfully, it continued to execute main() which failed with 'Missing required argument: --pr'. Fixed by adding process.exit(0) after the test passes to prevent execution of main(). All 4 checks pass: Docker build OK, NOP test reward=0, Gold test reward=1, Rubric rules verified manually (all 3 rules satisfied).

quality_gate.notes: flags=['lint_tier_b:1', 'B:[B] pinned_dependencies @ environment/Dockerfile:12: unpinned pip deps: pytest']
